query:
-- Get all billing items for the 7 services' actual customers
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0011', 'C0066', 'C2441', 'C0288', 'C0072', 'C0061', 'C0151')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, ABS(bi.lineAmount) DESC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Get all billing items for the 7 services' actual customers
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0011', 'C0066', 'C2441', 'C0288', 'C0072', 'C0061', 'C0151')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, ABS(bi.lineAmount) DESC;
